name: frontendskills
description: Audit-aware, opinionated skills for scalable frontends: the Vite-SPA app lifecycle (React 19 / Vue 3), a framework-agnostic landing-page catalogue, and a delivery-workflow catalogue (commits, pull requests).

plugins.name: frontendskills
plugins.description: Senior frontend judgment as executable, audit-first Claude Code skills. Vite-SPA app lifecycle (React 19 / Vue 3), a framework-agnostic landing catalogue, and a workflow catalogue — commit messages and pull requests that read from junior to CTO.
